assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Explicitly recommends Extended release channel with detailed justification about 24 months support and minimal auto-upgrades

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Shows exact gcloud command with --add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades and explains control plane patches flow automatically

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Configures Sunday 6-12 AM maintenance window with specific gcloud command and FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SU

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Shows separate h100-training node pool for GPUs and cpu-support pool for other workloads with dedicated configurations

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Shows manual upgrade commands and strategy for quarterly upgrades during training gaps, with validation steps and rollback safety

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Provides detailed YAML example with CHECKPOINT_INTERVAL=1800 and terminationGracePeriodSeconds=3600 for checkpoint saving

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Includes multi-environment strategy with staging cluster and mentions creating staging jobs that run 24-48 hours to test upgrade impacts

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: While it mentions RDMA topology with --placement-type COMPACT, it doesn't specifically note strict GKE version requirements or compatibility verification for GPUDirect/RDMA
